creator: bsam@FreeBSD.org
text:
Here are new linux-f8-* infrastructure ports to be used with
	linux_base-f8 port and compat.linux.osrelease=2.6.16.

Fix: Please, create repocopies of those ports and assign
	this PR back to me.



WBR
-- 
bsam--4SA2jCFv5BbqNYfBcoExmUX87Nd6L3xCE29j7EMEbXJ3azgI
Content-Type: text/plain; name="list.PR"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="list.PR"
